title: Your Brain Is A Quantum Time Machine (ft. Eric Wargo)
summary: This video essay explores the science behind precognition and psychic phenomena, featuring Eric Wargo's thesis that the brain functions as a quantum time machine capable of accessing future information. The episode synthesizes evidence from the CIA's Stargate program, quantum biology research, and neuroscience to argue that human intuition may involve temporal non-locality and quantum processes in brain structures like microtubules.

acronyms.definition: US intelligence agency that backed the Stargate psychic spy program
US military intelligence agency that co-sponsored the Stargate program
Brain imaging technique that tracks blood flow to measure brain activity

events.description: Start of the CIA and DIA backed Stargate psychic spy program
End of the Stargate psychic spy program
Joseph McMoneagle remote viewed a Soviet shipyard and described a massive nuclear submarine (later confirmed as the Typhoon)
Dean Koontz wrote 'The Eyes of Darkness' featuring a bioweapon from Wuhan called Wuhan-400
Morgan Robertson wrote 'Futility or Wreck of the Titan' predicting the Titanic disaster
Wernher von Braun published 'Project Mars: A Technical Tale' featuring a leader named Elon
Max Planck's quantum revolution explained black body radiation
Mark Twain was born as Halley's Comet passed by Earth
Mark Twain died one day after Halley's Comet's closest approach to Earth

key_claims.claim: The Stargate psychic spy program ran from 1972 to 1995 and was funded by the CIA and DIA
Joseph McMoneagle won the Legion of Merit for contributing intelligence in over 200 critical national security cases
Remote viewing experiments showed a 35% hit rate, which was found to be repeatable
Jessica Utts concluded that psychic functioning has been well established using standards applied to any other area of science
The brain may be a room temperature quantum system according to Roger Penrose
Microtubules may be responsible for quantum coherence in the brain and are the on/off switches for conscious perception
The caudate nucleus and putamen in the brain's basal ganglia determine a person's psychic ability based on neuronal density
Confirmatory feedback may be required for remote viewing to work - remote viewers see feedback from the future
Quantum computers can theoretically send information back in time
The brain is a hybrid of classical and quantum systems
Efim Liberman's goldfish experiment showed that cytoskeletons are essential for conscious awareness and spatial navigation
